journey.name: Terminal — customer search & management
journey.description: End-to-end journey simulating a contact-centre agent scenario: register a loyalty customer via the Loyalty API, create a staff user via the User MS, authenticate via the Admin API to obtain a staff JWT, search for the customer directly via the Customer MS, search again via the Loyalty API admin search endpoint and validate the result, then delete the customer via the Customer MS.

steps.name: Register loyalty customer
steps.description: Register a new loyalty programme member via the Loyalty API. This orchestrates three downstream steps: Customer MS creates the loyalty record, Identity MS creates the login account, and Customer MS is patched to link the identity reference. The member is assigned to the Blue tier with zero points.

steps.name: Create staff user
steps.description: Create a new employee user account directly on the User MS. This account will be used to authenticate via the Admin API in the next step, simulating a contact-centre agent logging in to search for customers.

steps.name: Admin login
steps.description: Authenticate the staff user created in Step 2 via the Admin API. The Admin API delegates to the User MS for credential validation and JWT issuance. The returned access token is used to authorise the admin customer search in Step 4.

steps.name: Search customers via Customer MS
steps.description: Search for the loyalty customer registered in Step 1 directly on the Customer MS using the customer's surname as the query. This is the same downstream call that the Loyalty API admin search endpoint orchestrates internally. Validates that the customer appears in the results with the correct loyalty number, name, tier, and active status.

steps.name: Admin search customers
steps.description: Search for the loyalty customer registered in Step 1 using the staff JWT obtained in Step 3. Calls the Loyalty API admin search endpoint with the customer's surname as the query. This endpoint orchestrates a call to the Customer MS search (tested directly in Step 4). Validates that the customer appears in the results with the correct loyalty number, name, tier, and active status.

steps.name: Delete loyalty customer
steps.description: Delete the loyalty customer created in Step 1 via the Customer MS. This is a direct microservice call using the host key, simulating a registration rollback cleanup. Removes the customer record from the database.

steps.name: Verify customer deleted
steps.description: Confirm the customer no longer exists by attempting to retrieve them from the Customer MS. Expects a 404 Not Found response, proving the deletion in Step 6 was successful.
